name: api-sign-dependency
description: Package for API request signing dependency

scripts.postpack: export DEPENDENCY_NAME=${npm_package_name}-${npm_package_version} && rm -f ${DEPENDENCY_NAME}.zip  && tar -tf ${DEPENDENCY_NAME}.tgz | sed 's/^package\///' | zip -@r ${DEPENDENCY_NAME}.zip; rm ${DEPENDENCY_NAME}.tgz
